note: Video exposes a `video` field type with upload/embed widgets, HTML5/embed formatters, a pluggable embed-provider plugin type, per-provider stream wrappers, and a video_transcode submodule. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to find; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, which field type does the Video module add, what core field type does it extend, and what are its default widget and formatter?
evals.expected_output: It adds the `video` field type, which extends core FileItem; default widget is `video_embed` and default formatter is `video_embed_player`.

evals.prompt: I want editors to upload MP4/WebM files rather than paste a YouTube URL into a Video field. Which widget do I pick on Manage form display, and what is the other widget?
evals.expected_output: Choose the `video_upload` widget for local file uploads (default extensions mp4 ogv webm); the `video_embed` widget is for pasting a remote provider URL.

evals.prompt: Which Video formatter renders an uploaded file in an HTML5 <video> player, and name two of its playback settings.
evals.expected_output: The `video_player` (HTML5 Video Player) formatter; settings include controls, autoplay, loop, muted, width, height, preload.

evals.prompt: I need to support embedding videos from a new host in the Drupal Video module. What plugin type / annotation do I implement, which directory does the plugin live in, and which annotation properties match the URL and set the stream scheme?
evals.expected_output: Implement a @VideoEmbeddableProvider plugin under src/Plugin/video/Provider/ extending ProviderPluginBase; `regular_expressions` match the URL (named `id` capture) and `stream_wrapper` sets the scheme (equal to the plugin id).

evals.prompt: In code on a Drupal site, which service lists the available Video embed providers and detects which provider handles a given URL, and which method does the URL matching?
evals.expected_output: The video.provider_manager service (Drupal\video\ProviderManager); getProvidersOptionList() lists providers and loadApplicableDefinitionMatches() matches a URL to a provider.

evals.prompt: Which remote video embed providers does the Video module ship with out of the box on Drupal 11?
evals.expected_output: YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Facebook, Instagram, and Vine, each with a matching read-only stream wrapper.

evals.prompt: I want to convert uploaded videos into web-compatible formats using local FFmpeg on a Drupal site with the Video module. Which submodule provides this?
evals.expected_output: The video_transcode submodule adds local FFmpeg transcoding, reusable presets, and a `video_upload_transcode` (Video Upload & Convert) widget.

evals.prompt: Where do I configure the Video module on a Drupal 11 site — is there a global admin settings page?
evals.expected_output: There is no global settings page (info.yml declares no configure route); configuration is per field and on Manage form display (widget) and Manage display (formatter).
